name: SYC20-IRF
scope: Engineering survey and topographic mapping for railway applications.
area: United Kingdom (UK) - on or related to the rail route from Shrewsbury to Crewe.
remarks: Intermediate CRS created in 2022 to assist the emulation of the ETRS89 / SYC20 SnakeGrid projected CRS through transformation ETRS89-GBR [OSNet v2009] to SYC20-IRF (1) (code 10238) used in conjunction with the SYC20-TM map projection (code 10239).
